enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder while high, catching up after his girlfriend's 11-day visit. He discusses his fantasy world-building website project — tracing ancient city walls in Google Earth, counting populations, mapping wildlife and trails around Boulder — and announces plans to wind down the website by January to shift toward YouTube videos and audiobooks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to wrap it up by January after ~4 years, feels it's time for a change
plans to shift to talking videos and audiobook content, sees it as healthier balance
has a personal theory that diet matters more than exercise for long-term health
dismissive and adversarial — plans to independently name all Boulder bears and make official names obsolete
senses he's been too isolated and wants to re-engage with the world
